scripts.build: bun run scripts/build-greet.js && bun run --cwd packages/iceshrimp-sdk build && bun run --cwd packages/backend build && bun run --cwd packages/client build && bun run --cwd packages/sw build && bun run scripts/assets.js
scripts.build:debug: bun run scripts/build-greet.js && bun run --cwd packages/iceshrimp-sdk build && bun run --cwd packages/backend build:debug && bun run --cwd packages/client build && bun run --cwd packages/sw build && bun run scripts/assets.js
scripts.migrateandstart: bun run migrate && bun run start
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/backend lint && bun run --cwd packages/client lint && bun run --cwd packages/sw lint && bun run --cwd packages/iceshrimp-sdk lint
scripts.format: bun run --cwd packages/backend format && bun run --cwd packages/client format && bun run --cwd packages/sw format && bun run --cwd packages/iceshrimp-sdk format
